original_abstract:
Data visualization is a cornerstone of scientific communication, yet many researchers are hindered by the steep learning curves of programming-based tools or the high costs and platform restrictions of commercial software. To bridge this gap, we developed SRplot, a comprehensive, web-based platform designed for intuitive data visualization and graphing. SRplot integrates over 120 specialized functions, ranging from basic bar and line charts to complex genomic, transcriptomic, and clinical plots such as circos plots, heatmaps, and Kaplan-Meier curves. 

The server is designed for accessibility, requiring only a standard web browser and minimal local computing power, as all intensive processing occurs server-side. Through a user-friendly interface, researchers can simply paste their data into the platform to generate high-quality graphs in real-time. SRplot offers extensive customization options for aesthetic refinement and supports high-resolution downloads in both bitmap (PNG, TIFF) and vector (PDF, SVG) formats suitable for publication. Continuously updated based on community feedback, SRplot has already supported more than 500 peer-reviewed publications across high-impact journals. The platform is freely available to the scientific community at http://www.bioinformatics.com.cn/SRplot.
humanized_abstract:
Data visualization is a core component of scientific communication and while there are numerous powerful programming-based tools and commercial applications available for data visualization, they often have very steep learning curves, expensive costs, and system requirements that can be restrictive. To address this need, SRplot (Studio Rocksplot) was developed to provide an easy-to-use web-based application for visualization and graphing. This application utilizes over 120 dedicated plot functions for production of simple bar and line plots as well as a wide variety of more complex plots including genomic, transcriptomic and clinical plots, e.g. circos plots, heatmaps and Kaplan Meier plots.

The server needs only a standard web browser and minimal local resources, as all computational tasks are performed on the server. By entering the data to be plotted in the interface provided, high quality plots are generated in real time. SRplot also allows for further customization of the generated plots for better looks and also supports the downloading of high resolution plots in bitmap (PNG, TIFF) and vector (PDF, SVG) formats that can be used for publication. SRplot is updated constantly based on user suggestions and has already supported the publication of over 500 papers in top journals. SRplot is freely available at http://www.bioinformatics.com.cn/SRplot.
